blended.narrative: Boyne Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 194 ft. Looking ahead, 39 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 17" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.
